responses.Backwards compatibility: Add async versions alongside callback versions with deprecation warnings
responses.Promisification approach: Use util.promisify for Node.js built-ins, wrap third-party manually
responses.Conversion strategy: Convert module by module (UserService first, then dependencies)
responses.Error handling pattern: Try/catch in async functions, throw Error objects with context
responses.Parallel operations: Use Promise.all() for critical ops, Promise.allSettled() for non-critical
responses.Testing approach: Update tests incrementally with each module conversion
